title: Marque (Static Site Generator)
description: An enhanced Markdown static site generator focused on structured content, modular layouts, and fast iteration.
markdown:
## What
Marque is a static site generator designed to create structured, modular, and highly readable websites using a custom Markdown-based syntax. It focuses on simplicity, clarity, and developer control while enabling rich layouts through composable primitives like cards, steps, and grids.

## How
Built with Node.js as a CLI tool, Marque parses extended Markdown into structured HTML. It introduces a custom component system using directives (e.g. @card, @step, @row) to define layout directly within content. The build pipeline transforms content into static assets, enabling fast local development with a live preview server and optimized production builds.

## Result
A fully functional documentation and content framework capable of generating clean, modular websites with minimal setup. Used to build structured project pages, technical documentation, and content-driven platforms with a strong focus on readability and layout consistency.

### AI Usage
This project was developed with partial assistance from AI tools for ideation, iteration, and refinement, while maintaining full control over architecture and implementation decisions.
